features: USB C Fast plug - Our USB C Plug UK 2PACK are made for iPhone series for power up to 4X faster than original 5W Charger.This multi-port charger it supports 25w Power Delivery, and Charge your devices from 0% to 60% in only 30 minutes.

Portable and Compact - This multi usb c charging plug is lightweight and compact design and has 4 ports each with 2-usb a and 2-usb c at the same time if you have more than one devices need power charge, which is for smartphone charging at home, office

Safety System- Our 2-PACK usb fast charger plug is built-in multiple protection systems, Short circuit protection/ Overvoltage protection/ Overcurrent Protection/Over Temperature Protection/Over Power Protection, Which ensures you security when you are charging at night.

Widely Compatibility- The usb plug uk is compatible with all smartphones, even for ipad, latop, like for iPhone 16/15/14/13/12/11 Pro/11Pro Max/XS Max,iPhone XS/XS Max/XR/X/10/8/8 Plus/7/7 Plus/6/6S/SE, iPad series, Airpods,for Samsung Galaxy S23/S22/S21/S20/S10/S9/S8, Galaxy A series, LG, HTC, Xperia, Nokia,MacBook Pro,Google Pixelbook.
What You Get- 40W usb c charger plug UK (White) x2, with multi ports charging, which is wonderful for all devices charging. and we values each buyer's shopping experience
